song.title: Jesus You Are So Beautiful
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D F#m G A 1) Lord Jesus, You are so beautiful . D G And in Your person peace abides . D A D To soothe my soul. . D F#m G A Oh, Jesus, be my light and my love. . D G Though I’m in shadows of the earth, . D A D I think only above. [C] Chorus . G A D Bm Lord Jesus, take from me all my empty yearnings. . G A F#m Bm Make me to give to You all my nights and mornings. . G A D Bm I want a clear sky between us and a well-lit straight way. . G A D Lord, guide me every moment each day. [V2] . D F#m G A 2) And if my mind from my spirit part, . D G If doubts and fears should hold my heart . D A D And control my thoughts; . D F#m G A Then, Lord, press faith into my heart, . D G Seal me and claim me as Your own; . D A D By Your blood I’m bought.
[E] 1) Lord Jesus, You are so beautiful And in Your person peace abides To soothe my soul. Oh, Jesus, be my light and my love. Though I’m in shadows of the earth, I think only above. Chorus Lord Jesus, take from me all my empty yearnings. Make me to give to You all my nights and mornings. I want a clear sky between us and a well-lit straight way. Lord, guide me every moment each day. 2) And if my mind from my spirit part, If doubts and fears should hold my heart And control my thoughts; Then, Lord, press faith into my heart, Seal me and claim me as Your own; By Your blood I’m bought.
